title: 提供上下文让 Claude 理解「为什么」
title_en: Add Context So Claude Understands the "Why"

body.concept: Claude 在理解任务动机后表现更好。告诉它「为什么」要这样做，它就能在模糊地带做出更合理的判断，而不仅仅机械执行指令。
body.analogy: 就像告诉设计师「这个页面是给老年用户看的」比「字号改大」更有效——前者传达了目标，后者只传达了一个操作。Claude 足够聪明，能从目标泛化出你没想到的细节。
body.visual: 两个箭头：一条写着「指令 → 执行」（窄），另一条写着「指令 + 动机 → 理解 → 更好的执行」（宽）

body_en.concept: Claude performs better when it understands the motivation behind a task. Telling it "why" helps it make better judgment calls in ambiguous situations, rather than just mechanically following instructions.
body_en.analogy: Like telling a designer 'this page is for elderly users' instead of just 'make the font bigger' — the former communicates the goal, the latter just one action. Claude is smart enough to generalize from goals to details you didn't think of.
body_en.visual: Two arrows: one labeled 'instruction → execution' (narrow), another labeled 'instruction + motivation → understanding → better execution' (wide)
